children.text: Detective Sharp came to the prison.
The police showed him a letter from Jim Burton.
children.cn: 警察给他看了一封吉姆·伯顿写的信。
children.statement: showed 是 show 的过去式。
children.explanation: show 是规则动词，过去式加 ed。

children.text: Police Officer: He stole many jewels. But we didn't find the jewels on him.
children.cn: 警官：他偷了很多珠宝。但我们没有在他身上发现珠宝。
children.statement: stole 是 steal 的过去式。
children.explanation: steal 的过去式是不规则变化 stole。

children.text: Detective Sharp: What did he do? Let's see the letter.
children.cn: 谢普侦探：他做了什么？让我们看看这封信。

children.text: Dear Susan, I hope you're happy after reading these sweet words!
children.cn: 亲爱的苏珊，我希望你在读到这些甜言蜜语后会感到幸福！
children.statement: reading 在这里是动名词形式。
children.explanation: 在介词 after 之后使用动词的 -ing 形式。

children.text: I miss you and our girls, my sweet. There is so much to say.
children.cn: 我想念你和我们的女儿们，我的宝贝。有太多话要说了。

children.text: You are all so sweet. Are you happy these days?
children.cn: 你们都太贴心了。这些日子你开心吗？

children.text: Your eyes are bright and sweet. Jewels can't be so shiny.
children.cn: 你的眼睛明亮又甜美。珠宝也不及此般闪耀。
children.statement: Jim 把苏珊的眼睛比作珠宝。
children.explanation: Jim 说珠宝都没有苏珊的眼睛那样闪亮（shiny）。

children.text: You look sweet in your green dress! You always look so sweet!
children.cn: 你穿那件绿裙子看起来很甜美！你看起来总是那么甜美！

children.text: The girls look happy in our sweet garden.
children.cn: 女儿们在我们的甜美花园里看起来很开心。
children.explanation: Jim 在信中多次提到 sweet，这可能是一个关于珠宝藏在花园里的暗示。

children.text: Police Officer: There is something wrong with the letter. But I just don't know what it is.
children.cn: 警官：这封信有点不对劲。但我就是不知道是什么。
children.statement: something wrong with... 是“...出毛病了”的意思。
children.explanation: 这是一个常用句型，用来表达某物有问题。

children.text: Detective Sharp: Aha, I see! Don't give the letter to his wife.
children.cn: 谢普侦探：啊哈，我明白了！不要把这封信交给他妻子。

children.text: Detective Sharp: We can get the jewels back now!
children.cn: 谢普侦探：我们现在可以把珠宝找回来了！
children.statement: get back 意为“找回；取回”。
